'''UR41-284''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[UR41-284 system/Legends|UR41-284 system]] of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].

==History==
It was the homeworld of a sentient species that attempted to resist [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. Thrawn ordered [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ferob]] of the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Iron Fist (Victory-class)|''Iron Fist'']] to destroy everything within 70km of the coordinates of the planet's museum district.
